productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed White Tshirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and stylish branding on the chest Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your true Bengali spirit with this white T-shirt from united colors of benetton. Perfect in style and great in comfort, this tee makes for a great casual wear. The print on the front lends it a strong brand identity, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with slim fit jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
